## Summary

-

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] Security-sensitive behavior was reviewed

## Security checklist

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, private keys, or local-only paths are committed
- [ ] New untrusted input paths validate, sanitize, or reject unsafe values
- [ ] New file, network, process, or shell access is scoped and justified
- [ ] Dependency or GitHub Actions changes are explained in the PR
